# Alex Rivera — Senior Python Backend Engineer

Senior backend engineer with 8 years building high-throughput web services and APIs.

## Skills
Python, FastAPI, Django, PostgreSQL, Redis, Celery, REST APIs, microservices,
Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (ECS, RDS, Lambda), pytest, CI/CD, system design.

## Experience
**Lead Backend Engineer — Fintech startup (2019–present)**
Designed and scaled a payments API handling 5k requests/sec. Led migration from a
Django monolith to FastAPI microservices on Kubernetes. Owned PostgreSQL schema
design, query optimization, and async task processing with Celery.

**Backend Engineer — SaaS company (2016–2019)**
Built REST APIs in Python/Django, wrote integration tests, and set up CI/CD pipelines.

## Looking for
Remote senior backend / platform engineering roles in Python.
